ns0:entry.ns0:title: 521xueweihan/HelloGitHub
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/521xueweihan/HelloGitHub
Language: python
分享 GitHub 上有趣、入门级的开源项目。Share interesting, entry-level open source projects on GitHub.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Alishahryar1/free-claude-code
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Alishahryar1/free-claude-code
Language: python
Use claude code and codex for free in the terminal, VSCode extension, and discord like OpenClaw (voice supported)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OpenBMB/VoxCPM
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OpenBMB/VoxCPM
Language: python
VoxCPM2: Tokenizer-Free TTS for Multilingual Speech Generation, Creative Voice Design, and True-to-Life Cloning

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PaddlePaddle/PaddleOCR
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PaddlePaddle/PaddleOCR
Language: python
Turn any PDF or image document into structured data for your AI. A powerful, lightweight OCR toolkit that bridges the gap between images/PDFs and LLMs. Supports 100+ languages.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Panniantong/Agent-Reach
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Panniantong/Agent-Reach
Language: python
Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: alexzhang13/rlm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alexzhang13/rlm
Language: python
General plug-and-play inference library for Recursive Language Models (RLMs), supporting various sandboxes.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: calesthio/OpenMontage
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/calesthio/OpenMontage
Language: python
World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: fastapi/typer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/fastapi/typer
Language: python
Typer, build great CLIs. Easy to code. Based on Python type hints.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: fivetran/great_expectations
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/fivetran/great_expectations
Language: python
Always know what to expect from your data.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google-research/timesfm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google-research/timesfm
Language: python
TimesFM (Time Series Foundation Model) is a pretrained time-series foundation model developed by Google Research for time-series forecasting.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: infiniflow/ragflow
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/infiniflow/ragflow
Language: python
RAGFlow is a leading open-source Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) engine that fuses cutting-edge RAG with Agent capabilities to create a superior context layer for LLMs

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/RD-Agent
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/RD-Agent
Language: python
Research and development (R&D) is crucial for the enhancement of industrial productivity, especially in the AI era, where the core aspects of R&D are mainly focused on data and models. We are committed to automating these high-value generic R&D processes through R&D-Agent, which lets AI drive data-driven AI. 🔗https://aka.ms/RD-Agent-Tech-Report

ns0:entry.ns0:title: music-assistant/server
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/music-assistant/server
Language: python
Music Assistant is a free, opensource Media library manager that connects to your streaming services and a wide range of connected speakers. The server is the beating heart, the core of Music Assistant and must run on an always-on device like a Raspberry Pi, a NAS or an Intel NUC or alike.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: roboflow/rf-detr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/roboflow/rf-detr
Language: python
RF-DETR is a real-time object detection and segmentation model architecture developed by Roboflow, SOTA on COCO, designed for fine-tuning. [ICLR 2026]

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch
Language: python
Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.
